name: mb_jmppair
m5_band: INFO regression: unconditional short JMP (EB) is V-pairable; `mov; jmp` groups pair (mov U, jmp V); abs-cyc tracks the oracle
note: Regression for finding [med] EB JMP V-pairing. p5model classifies JMP as PV/pairs_second. M5 makes the RTL pair `<UV op>; jmp` and charges an unconditional-jmp mispredict as 3, so the abs-cyc tracks the p5model golden.
